phase_name: Gantt UI Polish 3 — Header Alignment, Bar Drag-Resize, Back Button, Excel-Style Entry (+ UAT gap closures)

completed_tasks.name: Plan 01 — CSS header alignment (#ganttPane padding-top + #ganttHeaderOverlay top)
Plan 02 — Back link to project detail + Excel-style _focusNewRowAfterRender flag
Plan 03 — Bar extend drag (rightward = extend, leftward initially canceled)
Plan 04 — Bar reduce on leftward drag (signed daysDelta + clamp at start_date)
Plan 05 — Excel-style new task entry (drop showLoading + toast, optimistic append, local-state taskId)
Plan 06 — Leftward drag detect (route self-bar drops to resize, fixes Plan 04 unreachable bug)
Plan 07 — Suppress transient FS violation toast during drag-link write window
Plan 08 — Optimistic merge across snapshot wipes + focus/text preservation across renderTaskGrid

remaining_tasks.name: Browser UAT — 8 items: leftward shrink, rightward extend, bar-to-bar link, no transient FS toast, real FS toast still fires, rapid Enter row persistence, mid-typing snapshot survival, refresh persistence

human_actions_pending.action: Browser UAT in dev server (python -m http.server 8000) — see .continue-here.md punch list
human_actions_pending.context: All verification is manual in the browser; no automated test harness for SVG drag/snapshot timing

decisions.decision: Append Plans 04+05 then 06+07+08 to Phase 86.5 (not new phase)
decisions.rationale: User chose to keep related UAT in single phase (memory rule on parallel/sequential plan ownership). All gap closures touch project-plan.js and views.css from original 86.5 scope.

decisions.decision: Plan 06 uses condition expansion (toWrapper.dataset.id === fromTaskId) instead of restructuring mouseup handler
decisions.rationale: Surgical fix; existing resize block uses fromTaskId for geometry not toWrapper, so single-line condition change suffices

decisions.decision: Plan 07 uses _suppressFsViolationToast flag with finally block; fingerprint update unconditional
decisions.rationale: Snapshot listener fires between updateDoc(deps) and applyFsAutoSchedule; suppressing toast emission while keeping fingerprint baseline correct lets post-window legitimate violations toast normally

decisions.decision: Plan 08 uses _pendingOptimistic Map (not flag) and finally cleanup
decisions.rationale: Multiple in-flight writes can overlap during rapid Enter; a Map keyed by taskId is the only correct structure. finally guarantees cleanup on both success and failure.

decisions.decision: Plan 08 _savedEmptyRow takes precedence over _focusNewRowAfterRender in renderTaskGrid
decisions.rationale: If user has actual in-progress text in the empty row, preserving it is more important than auto-focusing post-Enter (which uses an empty input anyway)

next_action: Browser UAT in dev server. Punch list in .continue-here.md. After all 8 items pass, finalize phase via gsd-verify-work or close out and move to next phase.
context_notes: Phase 86.5 evolved across two UAT cycles: original 3 plans (01-03) shipped header alignment + back button + Excel flag + bar extend; UAT found 4 issues → plans 04+05 added; UAT found 3 issues → plans 06+07+08 added. All 8 plans now committed on v3.3. Outstanding work is purely browser-side validation. Two stale locked worktrees exist in .claude/worktrees/ from a failed Plan 02 spawn (worktree tooling spawned at stale base commit); they're benign but can be cleaned up via git worktree unlock + remove if desired.
